source.authority: Tax Administration Jamaica and Ministry of Finance and the Public Service
source.scope: Official-source-backed Jamaica calendar-year 2026 individual aggregate-income tax with standard, pensioner, golden-age and combined exemption schedules.

JM.notes: Ordinary individual aggregate-income tax using the effective 2026 threshold and caller-selected exemption schedule; payroll contributions, credits and PAYE period calculations remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 ordinary individual income tax with standard, pensioner, golden-age and expressly published combined exemption schedules.
